arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy’s four key qualities which could make him ideal to replace Erik ten Hag
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy has been backed to succeed Erik ten Hag as Manchester United manager by his fellow Dutchman Rene Meuelensteen, should the current boss be shown the door in the near future

arts.ttl: EXCLUSIVE: Marco Silva targeted as Man Utd's next manager
arts.sum: Football transfer news expert Duncan Castles has revealed on the Transfers Podcast, produced in conjunction with FootballTransfers, that the United are admirers of Fulham boss Silva, with the London club enjoying significant progress under the Portuguese boss. Castles said: "I think you have got to look at whether they go for someone who is experienced from inside the Premier League.

arts.ttl: LISTEN to It's All Kicking Off! Should Jhon Duran START against Manchester United or will Unai Emery rely on him to be his super sub?
arts.sum: Chris Sutton and Ian Ladyman gave their verdicts as they questioned whether Jhon Duran's Champions League heroics for Aston Villa have earned him a start against Man United.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag approves special Joshua Zirkzee Liverpool request before FC Porto vs Man United
arts.sum: Joshua Zirkzee made the trip to Anfield for Liverpool's Champions League clash with former club Bologna

arts.ttl: “That’s just the truth” – Erik ten Hag slammed for the one thing he’s never had at Man United
arts.sum: If there’s one thing that managers need from their players it’s total buy in to their methods, and Erik ten Hag doesn’t ever appear to have had that at Man United. Compare and contrast the effort and togetherness that Mikel Arteta and Pep Guardiola have at Arsenal and Man City respectively, and what Jurgen Klopp […] The post “That’s just the truth” – Erik ten Hag slammed for the one thing he’s never had at Man United appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: What Happened to Sadiq El Fitouri - Salford Player Phil Neville Told Man Utd to Sign
arts.sum: Sadiq El Fitouri signed for Manchester United from Salford City thanks to Phil Neville in 2015 - here's what happened to the defender.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy told he has four key traits to replace Erik ten Hag as Man Utd boss
arts.sum: Van Nistelrooy may have became a Manchester United legend on the pitch, but Rene Meuelensteen believes he has the right stuff to guide them to glory from the side lines should Erik ten Hag be shown the door

arts.ttl: Manchester United duo snubbed in latest England squad as Lee Carsley makes shock decision
arts.sum: United duo Harry Maguire and Marcus Rashford will be staying in Manchester during the international break

arts.ttl: 'I'm a Man Utd Treble winner – but Sir Alex Ferguson almost sacked me'
arts.sum: Peter Schmeichel has admitted that his behaviour at Manchester United was so out of order at one point, that Sir Alex Ferguson threatened to sack him

arts.ttl: Peter Schmeichel and Roy Keane put fiery Man Utd relationship on hold for Celtic love-in
arts.sum: Kasper Schmeichel is the No. 1 goalkeeper at Celtic Park this season
